subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Abhá Kingdom! If thou seekest an abundant portion from the outpourings of the Abhá Kingdom, and if from the rays [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی اگر از فیوضات ملکوت ابهی حظ اوفری خواهی و اگر از اشعه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
